description: Create an SLD style named 'optimized_places' in the 'ne' workspace and set it as the default style for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer. The style must feature a size 6 red circle (#FF0000) symbol and black (#000000) Arial 12px bold labels using the 'name' attribute. Configure VendorOptions for 'autoWrap' at 80 pixels, 'maxDisplacement' at 50 pixels, and 'spaceAround' at 10 pixels. Export a map preview image of the layer focused on Europe to /home/ga/places_optimized.png.
